mapper.insert: /* clsAcntCloseMgmtMapper.saveClsAcntCloseMerge */ MERGE INTO CLS_ACNT_CLOSE_INFO USING DUAL ON (CLS_ACNT_YM = #{CLS_ACNT_YM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND CLS_ACNT_DUTY_CD = #{CLS_ACNT_DUTY_CD, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND SRL_NUM = #{SRL_NUM, jdbcType=NUMERIC}) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET CLOSE_STAT_CD = #{CLOSE_STAT_CD, jdbcType=VARCHAR} , CLS_ACNT_CLOSE_DT = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') , RVISN_ID = #{USER_ID, jdbcType=VARCHAR} , RVISN_DTTM = SYSDATE WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( CLS_ACNT_YM , CLS_ACNT_DUTY_CD , SRL_NUM , CLS_ACNT_CLOSE_DT , APPL_STRT_DT , APPL_END_DT , CLOSE_STAT_CD , RMK , SLP_TRNSM_DTTM , REGST_ID , REG_DTTM , RVISN_ID , RVISN_DTTM ) VALUES ( #{CLS_ACNT_YM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} , #{CLS_ACNT_DUTY_CD, jdbcType=VARCHAR} , 1 , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') , #{CLS_ACNT_YM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} || '01' , DECODE(#{CLS_ACNT_YM, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '000000', '99991231', TO_CHAR(LAST_DAY(TO_DATE(#{CLS_ACNT_YM, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYYMM')), 'YYYYMMDD')) , #{CLOSE_STAT_CD, jdbcType=VARCHAR} , #{RMK, jdbcType=VARCHAR} , #{SLP_TRNSM_DTTM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} , #{USER_ID, jdbcType=VARCHAR} , SYSDATE , #{USER_ID, jdbcType=VARCHAR} , SYSDATE )
mapper.select: /* clsAcntCloseMgmtMapper.getSaleRecvnpayInfoCheck */ SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CLS_SALE_INFO A WHERE A.SALE_DT LIKE #{WORK_YM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} || '%' AND SALE_RECVNPAY_ISSU_YN <> 'Y'
mapper.update: /* clsAcntCloseMgmtMapper.insertCarryOverSaleRecvnpayInfo */ INSERT INTO CLS_SALE_RECVNPAY_INFO ( SALE_YM , ORGN_ID , SALE_ITM_CD , PREV_MON_BAL , SALE_ACML_AMT , CLS_ACNT_PROC_AMT , DPST_PROC_AMT , REGST_ID , REG_DTTM , RVISN_ID , RVISN_DTTM ) SELECT #{SALE_YM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AS SALE_YM , NVL(A.ORGN_ID, X.ORGN_ID) AS ORGN_ID , NVL(A.SALE_ITM_CD, X.SALE_ITM_CD) AS SALE_ITM_CD , NVL(A.PREV_MON_BAL, 0) + NVL(A.SALE_ACML_AMT, 0) - NVL(A.CLS_ACNT_PROC_AMT, 0) - NVL(A.DPST_PROC_AMT, 0) AS PREV_MON_BAL , 0 AS SALE_ACML_AMT , 0 AS CLS_ACNT_PROC_AMT , 0 AS DPST_PROC_AMT , #{USER_ID, jdbcType=VARCHAR} , SYSDATE , #{USER_ID, jdbcType=VARCHAR} , SYSDATE FROM CLS_SALE_RECVNPAY_INFO A ,( SELECT A.ORGN_ID , B.SALE_ITM_CD FROM ORG_ORGN_INFO_MST A , CLS_SALE_ITM_INFO B WHERE A.TYPE_CD = '20' /* 대리점 */ AND A.ORGN_STAT_CD = '4' /* 가동 */ AND B.SALE_ITM_YN = 'Y' GROUP BY A.ORGN_ID, B.SALE_ITM_CD ) X WHERE A.ORGN_ID(+) = X.ORGN_ID AND A.SALE_ITM_CD(+) = X.SALE_ITM_CD AND A.SALE_YM(+) = #{WORK_YM, jdbcType=VARCHAR}

/* clsAcntCloseMgmtMapper.updateSaleInfoClsAcntProcYn */ UPDATE CLS_SALE_INFO SET RVISN_ID = #{USER_ID, jdbcType=VARCHAR} , RVISN_DTTM = SYSDATE , CLS_ACNT_PROC_YN = 'Y' , CLS_ACNT_PROC_DT = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') , CLS_ACNT_YM = #{CLS_ACNT_YM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHERE (SALE_DT LIKE #{CLS_ACNT_YM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} || '%' AND CLS_ACNT_STDR_CD IN ('20', '21', '30', '31', '40', '41')) OR (SALE_DT LIKE TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(#{CLS_ACNT_YM, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYYMM'), 1), 'YYYYMM') || '%' AND CLS_ACNT_STDR_CD IN ('10', '11')) AND SALE_STAT_CD = '30' /* 매출확정 */
mapper.select: /* clsAcntCloseMgmtMapper.insertClsAcntInfoBatch */ INSERT INTO CLS_ACNT_INFO ( CLS_ACNT_YM , ORGN_ID , CLS_ACNT_ITM_CD , CLS_ACNT_TRGT_DT , CLS_ACNT_TRGT_AMT , CLS_ACNT_PROC_AMT , DPST_PROC_AMT , CLS_ACNT_STAT_CD , REGST_ID , REG_DTTM , RVISN_ID , RVISN_DTTM ) SELECT A.CLS_ACNT_YM , A.ORGN_ID , A.CLS_ACNT_ITM_CD , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') , SUM(NVL(A.CLS_ACNT_TRGT_AMT, 0)) AS CLS_ACNT_TRGT_AMT , SUM(NVL(A.CLS_ACNT_PROC_AMT, 0)) AS CLS_ACNT_PROC_AMT , SUM(NVL(A.DPST_PROC_AMT, 0)) AS DPST_PROC_AMT , '10' AS CLS_ACTN_STAT_CD , #{USER_ID, jdbcType=VARCHAR} , SYSDATE , #{USER_ID, jdbcType=VARCHAR} , SYSDATE FROM CLS_ACNT_DTL A , CLS_SALE_ITM_INFO B WHERE A.CLS_ACNT_YM = #{CLS_ACNT_YM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.SALE_ITM_CD = B.SALE_ITM_CD AND B.CLS_ACNT_PROC_YN = 'Y' /* 결산처리대상여부 */ GROUP BY A.CLS_ACNT_YM , A.ORGN_ID , A.CLS_ACNT_ITM_CD
/* clsAcntCloseMgmtMapper.getSaleYm */ SELECT TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(#{WORK_YM, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYYMM'), 1), 'YYYYMM') FROM DUAL
